summary: Mobile screenshot task for Farewell Memorial Wall. Captured 3 screenshots at 390px (iPhone) viewport: (1) /farewell tab bar showing all 4 tabs, (2) 🌈 Wall tab content showing Mystique's memorial card, (3) scrolled view showing full card + 'Add Your Pet's Memorial' button area.
verified_flows: ✅ Tab bar shows all 4 tabs: 'Farewell', 'Services', 'Find Care', '🌈 Wall' (data-testid: farewell-tab-*)
✅ Rainbow Bridge Wall header visible after clicking Wall tab
✅ Mystique's memorial card present with photo, name 'Mystique', breed 'Shih Tzu', owner 'Loved by Dipali'
✅ Tribute message: 'Forever in our hearts, Mystique. You taught us what unconditional love tru...'
✅ '1 souls remembered' and '1 tributes shared' stats showing
✅ 'Add Your Pet's Memorial' button visible for logged-in user (data-testid='add-memorial-btn')
screenshots: /tmp/farewell_mobile_tabbar.png — Farewell tab active, all 4 tabs visible in tab bar
/tmp/farewell_mobile_wall_tab.png — 🌈 Wall tab active, Rainbow Bridge Wall header + Mystique memorial card top
/tmp/farewell_mobile_wall_scrolled.png — Scrolled view of Mystique full card + Mystique's Gyan artwork
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile farewell page fully verified at 390px. Tab bar has 4 tabs (Farewell/Services/Find Care/🌈 Wall). Wall tab shows Mystique's memorial (Shih Tzu, Loved by Dipali, active status). Add Memorial button visible for logged-in users. Screenshots saved to /tmp/. All flows working correctly.
